title: Tiktok Farlands
description: This mod adds the bee playing the violin in the water tower in the farlands or in the overworld, why did I do this 😭
body:
Adds the bee that plays the violin (double bass, cello, whatever you wanna call it) inside the water tower to the farlands and the overworld.

![Tiktok Farlands Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4af21812b674a8a5989a83b417a2ca60e117dc33.png)

# Features
- Animated Violin Bee mob
- Custom structures that spawn in the farlands and in the overworld
- Music that plays when your near those structures


# Installation
1. Install Minecraft and forge for the mod version you want to use.
2. Drop the mod .JAR into `mods/`.
3. Start Minecraft (best on a fresh testing world).

# Farlands Installation
1. Install the Farlands Reborn mod alongside this mod on forge 1.20.1
2. Make sure its the Forge 1.20.x version of the Farlands Reborn Mod
3. You can find the mod here: https://modrinth.com/mod/farlands-reborn/versions

# Supported versions
- Minecraft: **1.20.1**
- Loader: **Forge**
